llm_raw.description: A specialized CRM and relationship management platform tailored for financial services, investment banking, and private capital firms.
llm_raw.notes: DealCloud (by Intapp) is enterprise-grade software typically requiring a contract and dedicated implementation; API access is generally restricted to licensed clients.
